rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey: nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n   263→\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n   264→\tdefer ts.Close()\n   265→\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n   266→\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n   267→\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n   268→\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n   269→\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n   270→\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n   271→\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n   272→\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n   273→}\n   274→\n   275→func Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n   276→\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n   277→\tdefer ts.Close()\n   278→\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n   279→\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n   280→\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n   281→\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n   282→\t}\n   283→\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n   284→\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n   285→\n   286→\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n   287→\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n   288→\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n   289→\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n   290→\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n   291→\terr = testStoreWithError(t, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Match ANY constraints\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_NoVariants_NoDistributions(t errors.Join(\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: 2 errors in empty disjunction:\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and \\\"default\\\" (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and string (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdir, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t_, err = SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), dir)\n\t\t\tif !assert.Equal(t, test.err, err) {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Println(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n}\n\nfunc TestWalkDocuments(t *testing.T) {\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tpath  string\n\t\tcount int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 2,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/implicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 6,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/exclude_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tsrc, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tvar docs []*ext.Document\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, WalkDocuments(zaptest.NewLogger(t), src, func(d *ext.Document) error {\n\t\t\t\tdocs = append(docs, d)\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}))\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, docs, test.count)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFSWithIndex(t *testing.T) {\n\tfwi, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\")\n\n\tss, err := rollout.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRollouts_MultipleSegments() {\n\tt := true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tfirstSegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), secondSegment.Key},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:    2,\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:       true,\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys: []string{firstSegment.Key, secondSegment.Key},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, rollout.NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\trs, ok := rollout.Rule.(*flipt.Rollout_Segment)\n\t\tassert.True(t, ok, \"rule should successfully assert to a rollout segment\")\n\t\tassert.Len(t, rs.Segment.SegmentKeys, 2)\n\t\tassert.Contains(t, rs.Segment.SegmentKeys, firstSegment.Key)\n\t\tassert.Contains(t, rs.Segment.SegmentKeys, secondSegment.Key)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRolloutsNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tType:        flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, reqs[1].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, uint64(1), pageToken.Offset)\n\n\topts = append(opts, storage.WithPageToken(res.NextPageToken))\n\n\tres, err = s.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[0].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRollout_InvalidRolloutType() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRolloutNamespace_FlagNotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tsegmentOne, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:       \"segment_one\",\n\t\tName:      \"Segment One\",\n\t\tMatchType: flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentOne)\n\n\tsegmentTwo, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:       \"segment_two\",\n\t\tName:      \"Segment Two\",\n\t\tMatchType: flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentTwo)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:      \"segment_one\",\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rollout)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, rollout.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, rollout.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rollout.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE, rollout.Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentOne.Key, rollout.GetSegment().SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, rollout.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rollout.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.CreatedAt.Seconds, rollout.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, rollout.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tId:          rollout.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     rollout.FlagKey,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           false,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{segmentOne.Key, segmentTwo.Key},\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rollout.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updated.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE, updated.Type)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updated.GetSegment().SegmentKeys, segmentOne.Key)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updated.GetSegment().SegmentKeys, segmentTwo.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, updated.GetSegment().Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updated.GetSegment().SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tValue: rollout.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tDescription:  \"foobar\",\n\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tValue: updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateRollout_InvalidType() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tctx := context.TODO()\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"segment_one\",\n\t\tName:         \"Segment One\",\n\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trollout, err := s.store.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey:   segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:         1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\n\tgot, err := s.store.GetRule(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(s.namespace), rule.Id)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, got.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, got.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.FlagKey, got.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.SegmentKey, got.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Rank, got.Rank)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, got.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, got.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetRule_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.GetRule(context.TODO(), World\\\"\")\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := rule.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRulesNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       2,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range clearing the DB between tests\n\topts := []storage.QueryOption{storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, reqs[1].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, uint64(1), pageToken.Offset)\n\n\topts = append(opts, storage.WithPageToken(res.NextPageToken))\n\n\tres, err = s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, reqs[0].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRulesPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"flag-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t\tName:         \"flag-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"segment-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t\tName:         \"segment-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalRules = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalRules; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:         int32(i + 1),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(ctx, &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\t\tVariantId:    variant.Id,\n\t\t\t\tRuleId:       rule.Id,\n\t\t\t\tRollout:      100.0,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListRules(ctx,\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(namespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListRules(ctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(namespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(token),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalRules)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalRules; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, found[i].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, segment.Key, found[i].SegmentKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(i+1), found[i].Rank)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Distributions, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, found[i].Id, found[i].Distributions[0].RuleId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, found[i].Distributions[0].VariantId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100.0), found[i].Distributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, found[i].Id, found[i].Distributions[1].RuleId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, found[i].Distributions[1].VariantId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100.0), found[i].Distributions[1].Rollout)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRuleAndDistribution() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t,  flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variant.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   100,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, distribution.CreatedAt.Seconds, distribution.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRuleAndDistributionNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:    s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey:      segment.Key,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\tRank:            1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, rule.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, rule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segment.Key, rule.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rule.Rank)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.CreatedAt.Seconds, rule.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, rule.SegmentOperator)\n\n\tdistribution, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:       rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId:    variant.Id,\n\t\tRollout:      100,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, distribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, distribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100), distribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.CreatedAt.Seconds, distribution.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateDistribution_NoRule() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    \"foo\",\n\t\tVariantId: variant.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   100,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"variant %q, rule %q, flag %q in namespace %q not found\", t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), s.namespace, t.Name(), s.namespace))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateRuleAndDistribution() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariantOne, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name() + \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variantOne)\n\n\tvariantTwo, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name() + \"bar\",\n\t\tName:        \"bar\",\n\t\tDescription: \"baz\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variantOne)\n\n\tsegmentOne, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s_one\", t.Name()),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentOne)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segmentOne.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, rule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentOne.Key, rule.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rule.Rank)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.CreatedAt.Seconds, rule.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tdistribution, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantOne.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   100,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, distribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantOne.Id, distribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100), distribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.CreatedAt.Seconds, distribution.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tsegmentTwo, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s_two\", t.Name()),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentTwo)\n\n\tupdatedRule, err := s.store.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\tId:              rule.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey:      segmentTwo.Key,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, updatedRule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedRule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.FlagKey, updatedRule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentTwo.Key, updatedRule.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updatedRule.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updatedRule.SegmentOperator)\n\t// assert.Equal(t, rule.CreatedAt.Seconds, updatedRule.CreatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\tt.Log(\"Update rule to references two segments.\")\n\n\tupdatedRule, err = s.store.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\tId:              rule.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{segmentOne.Key, segmentTwo.Key},\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, updatedRule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedRule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.FlagKey, updatedRule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updatedRule.SegmentKeys, segmentOne.Key)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updatedRule.SegmentKeys, segmentTwo.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updatedRule.SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updatedRule.Rank)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// update distribution rollout\n\tupdatedDistribution, err := s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tId:        distribution.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantOne.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedDistribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantOne.Id, updatedDistribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(10), updatedDistribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// update distribution variant\n\tupdatedDistribution, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tId:        distribution.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantTwo.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedDistribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantTwo.Id, updatedDistribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(10), updatedDistribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest{\n\t\tId:        distribution.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantOne.Id,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteRule() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\tvar rules []*flipt.Rule\n\n\t// create 3 rules\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       int32(i + 1),\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\t// delete second rule\n\terr = s.store.DeleteRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tId:      rules[1].Id,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\t// ensure rules are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(got))\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[0].Id, got[0].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[2].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteRuleNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(),  rules[1].Id,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key)))\n\t// ensure rules are in &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\tvar rules []*flipt.Rule\n\n\t// create 3 rules\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       int32(i + 1),\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\t// order rules in reverse order\n\tsort.Slice(rules, func(i, j int) bool { return rules[i].Rank > rules[j].Rank })\n\n\tvar ruleIds []string\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\truleIds = append(ruleIds, rule.Id)\n\t}\n\n\t// re-order rules\n\terr = s.store.OrderRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleIds: ruleIds,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\n\t// ensure rules are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 3, len(got))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[0].Id, got[0].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[1].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[2].Id, got[2].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(3), got[2].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[2].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestOrderRulesNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotZero(t, len(got))\n\n\tfor _, rule := range got {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, rule.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Len(t, rule.SegmentKeys, 2)\n\t\tassert.Contains(t, rule.SegmentKeys, firstSegment.Key)\n\t\tassert.Contains(t, rule.SegmentKeys, secondSegment.Key)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRulesNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey: t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       2,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\topts := []storage.QueryOption{storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[1].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, uint64(1), pageToken.Offset)\n\n\topts = append(opts, storage.WithPageToken(res.NextPageToken))\n\n\tres, err = s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](opts...),\n\t\t))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, reqs[0].Rank, got[0].Rank)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListRulesPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"flag-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t\tName:         \"flag-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"segment-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t\tName:         \"segment-list-rules-full-walk\",\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalRules = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalRules; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:         int32(i + 1),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(ctx, &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\t\tVariantId:    variant.Id,\n\t\t\t\tRuleId:       rule.Id,\n\t\t\t\tRollout:      100.0,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListRules(ctx,\n\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(namespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListRules(ctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewResource(namespace, flag.Key),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(token),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalRules)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalRules; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, found[i].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, segment.Key, found[i].SegmentKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(i+1), found[i].Rank)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Distributions, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, found[i].Id, found[i].Distributions[0].RuleId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, found[i].Distributions[0].VariantId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100.0), found[i].Distributions[0].Rollout)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, found[i].Id, found[i].Distributions[1].RuleId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, found[i].Distributions[1].VariantId)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100.0), found[i].Distributions[1].Rollout)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateRuleAndDistribution() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variantOne)\n\n\tvariantTwo, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentOne)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: distribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100), distribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, distribution.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.CreatedAt.Seconds, distribution.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tsegmentTwo, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s_two\", t.Name()),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segmentTwo)\n\n\tupdatedRule, err := s.store.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\tId:              rule.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey:      segmentTwo.Key,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, updatedRule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedRule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.FlagKey, updatedRule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, segmentTwo.Key, updatedRule.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updatedRule.Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updatedRule.SegmentOperator)\n\t// assert.Equal(t, rule.CreatedAt.Seconds, updatedRule.CreatedAt.Seconds)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\tt.Log(\"Update rule to references two segments.\")\n\n\tupdatedRule, err = s.store.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\tId:              rule.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{segmentOne.Key, segmentTwo.Key},\n\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, updatedRule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedRule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.FlagKey, updatedRule.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updatedRule.SegmentKeys, segmentOne.Key)\n\tassert.Contains(t, updatedRule.SegmentKeys, segmentTwo.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR, updatedRule.SegmentOperator)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), updatedRule.Rank)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// update distribution rollout\n\tupdatedDistribution, err := s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tId:        distribution.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantOne.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedDistribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantOne.Id, updatedDistribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(10), updatedDistribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// update distribution variant\n\tupdatedDistribution, err = s.store.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:   flag.Key,\n\t\tId:        distribution.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId: variantTwo.Id,\n\t\tRollout:   10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedDistribution.RuleId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantTwo.Id, updatedDistribution.VariantId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, float32(10), updatedDistribution.Rollout)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, rule.UpdatedAt)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteDistribution(context.TODO(), TestUpdateRuleAndDistributionNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey: segmentTwo.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, updatedRule)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, rule.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, updatedRule.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantOne.Id,\n\t\tRollout:      10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, rule.Id,\n\t\tVariantId:    variantTwo.Id,\n\t\tRollout:      10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, distribution.Id, updatedDistribution.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rule.Id, t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tsegment, err := TestDeleteRule() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\tvar rules []*flipt.Rule\n\n\t// create 3 rules\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       int32(i + 1),\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\t// delete second rule\n\terr = s.store.DeleteRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tId:      rules[1].Id,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\t// ensure rules are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(got))\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[0].Id, got[0].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[2].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteRuleNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey: got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[2].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteRuleRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tId:           \"foo\",\n\t\tFlagKey:   t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\tvar rules []*flipt.Rule\n\n\t// create 3 rules\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:       int32(i + 1),\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\t// order rules in reverse order\n\tsort.Slice(rules, func(i, j int) bool { return rules[i].Rank > rules[j].Rank })\n\n\tvar ruleIds []string\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\truleIds = append(ruleIds, rule.Id)\n\t}\n\n\t// re-order rules\n\terr = s.store.OrderRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleIds: ruleIds,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key)))\n\n\t// ensure rules are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 3, len(got))\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[0].Id, got[0].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got[0].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[0].NamespaceKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[1].Id, got[1].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), got[1].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[1].NamespaceKey)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, rules[2].Id, got[2].Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(3), got[2].Rank)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got[2].NamespaceKey)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestOrderRulesNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\tvar rules []*flipt.Rule\n\n\t// create 3 rules\n\tfor i := 0; i < 3; i++ {\n\t\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   segment.Key,\n\t\t\tRank:         int32(i + 1),\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\t\trules = append(rules, rule)\n\t}\n\n\t// order rules in reverse order\n\tsort.Slice(rules, func(i, j int) bool { return rules[i].Rank > rules[j].Rank })\n\n\tvar ruleIds []string\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\truleIds = append(ruleIds, rule.Id)\n\t}\n\n\t// re-order rules\n\terr = s.store.OrderRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tRuleIds:      ruleIds,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key)))\n\n\t// ensure rules are in correct order\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tgot :=
